metadata.description: Public marketplace for Claude Code plugins and MCP clients from CE Dot Net

plugins.name: ace
plugins.description: Code Engine ACE - Intelligent pattern learning with continuous auto-search. v6.4.3: Fresh-session relevance log rotation. On fresh CC session start (SessionStart source=startup), ace-relevance.jsonl archives to ace-relevance.prev.jsonl; resume/compact/clear preserve continuity. One generation kept for inspection. Requires: Claude Code >= 2.1.100, ace-cli >= 3.15.0.
